scripts.preview:full: concurrently -n server,frontend -c yellow,cyan "npm run preview --prefix server" "npm run preview --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -n server,frontend -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build:full: concurrently -n server,frontend -c yellow,cyan "npm run build --prefix server" "npm run build --prefix frontend"
scripts.test:full: concurrently -n server,frontend -c yellow,cyan "npm test --prefix server" "npm test --prefix frontend"
